text.title: Sidekiq Background Jobs for Rails — Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example illustrating the full procedure for `ruby-sidekiq-jobs` against a representative task.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Async `OnboardingMailer.welcome` after a `User` is created; HTTP webhook to CRM on the same event. Owner: tl:alex; reviewer: tl:bob; cadence: per-release.

list.item: Each prerequisite supplied per the AGENTS.md table; sources linked.
Existing artefact catalogue checked for duplicates (none found).

section.title: Walkthrough
section.p: The team runs the five-step procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml`, recording one paragraph per step. At step 4 the self-check triggers a fix on the rationale (no input cited); re-check passes. The artefact emits with status='ready-for-owner-review'.

list.item: The decision tree in `content/06-decision-tree.xml` saved one round at step 1 by ruling out a duplicate artefact.
Without the self-check at step 4 the rationale would have shipped without input citations.
